WU + dyn + plyo + accelerations >> Like Race
SS/MS (CSD): 3 x 30m, 1 x 60m, 1 x 80m with good pacing
LS: 5 x 150m @80% [5'] >> R:15min >> 1 x 350m

WU 
8@ x side plank knee drive
https://youtu.be/mwmYCMjpzOc?si=s4Q2xYpMA_CD-pD9

16 x single arm and leg maintain climber
https://youtu.be/lTr-5J0iQfw?si=lLvFlx9fOCEuvuQU

20 x dead bug
https://youtu.be/Ddy4VF_4024?si=eS7OX-cKlTyxVtCb

2m Hip walk
https://youtube.com/shorts/TflwPYUBAJk?si=nJ-sNm65d_Iqux3K

8@ Side Plank Hold Leg Raise
https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=H9n2nZTxEJs

8@ SL bridging 
https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=vdmlNaXSjd4

8@ x side plank thoracic rotation

10 x forward backward lunge

ISO (2x3x4sec each)
Split stand low shin
SL calf raise
Wall push
10 x shin slide

Dynamic stretching 10mins

Drills (With Band-Vest)
3 x 15m ankling with knee swing forward
3 x 10miniH walk thru (2.5 ft)
10 x band resisted A-skips
10miniH A-skip (3ft)
5@ x SL cycling
3-cycles x RRL cycling
3-cycles x LLR cycling

Plyometrics 
2 x 40m backward run
10minih (3-4ft) hop thru
10minih SL 4-1 skips
2x10minih Alt 4-1 skips
2 x 6 x open (15-16ft) running skips
6@ x open 1-step-bnd

SS/MS/LS
Accelerations
5 x 5.5ft miniH run thru (slow speed but focusing on fast recovery)
5 x 60m tight swing forard (patient) technique runs 
SS Pacing
4 x (25 accelerate + 15m transaction + 30m top speed + 10m relaxation *but keep relatively high speed* + 20m re-acceleration) [6’]
MS Pacing
4 x (70m accelerate & transaction + 40m relaxation + 60m re-acceleration) [6’]
LS Pacing
2 x 150m (from 400m) (100m acceleration + 50m keep) [5’]
2 x 150m (From 300m) (100m acceleration *stay relax* + 50m re-acceleration) [5’]

All: 120m @90% 

SH CSD
3 x 3h [3']
3 x 8h [5']
